item.name: Verify authenticated user from auth collection

exec: pm.test('Standalone canonical run can start without auth-suite token', () => pm.expect([200, 401]).to.include(pm.response.code));

item.name: POST /api/v1/channels - create channel for handle-based compatibility checks
